features: About Lynx: For over 30 years, Lynx has served knockout fragrances and today over 8 million guys across the UK & Ireland use Lynx products every day. Lynx, originally launched under the name of Axe, was later introduced to our UK lads in ’85. Kickstarting with three separate fragrances: Amber, Musk, and Spice. Absolute classics. But it doesn’t stop there. We’ve gone from fragrances to antiperspirants, stick, roll-on, shower gels, hair products, and more

Make Your Shower Magnificent: Lynx range of Shower Gel will leave you pristine and feeling amazing. A great day starts with a great shower and there’s no greater shower than a Lynx shower. You never know what’s just around the corner. Or who. So, you need to smell your best whenever, wherever. This irresistible fragranced Body wash boosts your scent – and your confidence – leaving you clean, fresh and smelling 100% ready.

Recharge Your Body & Mind with Lynx: It's the shower essential in your everyday routine that will leave you feeling clean and rejuvenated with the fresh fragrance. This body wash is dermatologically tested and comes in a convenient pack. Wash away odour and smell refreshed for 12 hours with our cleansing body wash. Plus, our 100% plant-based moisturizers keep your skin feeling irresistibly soft, naturally. All day, all night – no matter what, you’re ready.

Unique Scent: Lynx deodorant antiperspirant not only gives you an insane scent but also keeps you fresh all day long. Whatever the occasion, it lasts all day long. Now available as a 12-hour Shower gel, this fragrance is designed to keep you cool and dry to embrace the unique something in you.

Perfect For: Whatever the occasion, it lasts all day long. Now available as a 12-hour Shower gel, this fragrance is designed to keep you cool and dry to embrace the unique something in you. Lynx Men's Shower Gel busts odour and stimulates you to take on the world! No matter how big or small life gets, you’ll always feel refreshed.
description: Product Description Lynx Africa Shower Gel – 6 Pack, Irresistible Scent, 12H Freshness Start every day feeling fresh and confident with this 6 pack of Lynx Africa Shower Gel . Infused with the iconic, masculine scent, this body wash delivers 12-hour freshness and is dermatologically tested for daily use. Packed with 100% plant-based moisturizers, it leaves your skin soft, clean, and ready for anything. Whether it’s morning or night, Lynx helps you stay at your best — wherever life takes you. Mandarin and Sandalwood Scent A fresh burst of mandarin balanced with smooth sandalwood for a bold, energizing fragrance. Great Fragrance Smell great every day with Lynx’s unmistakable blend of iconic, confidence-boosting scents. 12 Hours Fragrance Stay clean and refreshed all day with a fragrance that lasts up to 12 hours. Recyclable Bottle Made with the planet in mind, every bottle is 100% recyclable for a cleaner tomorrow.
